title: AssetInput
description: The input payload describing an asset to be reviewed by Taste Engine.

asset_description.description: A precise description of the asset, or a reference to the supplied image.

asset_reference.description: Optional path or URL to the asset image / mockup.

intended_use.description: Where and how the asset will be used (medium, placement, platform).

target_audience.description: The specific audience for this asset (may narrow the brand audience).

constraints.description: Asset-specific constraints (e.g. screen print, single color, 1080x1350, mobile-first).
